mapper.select: select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} order by orderid, stepseq

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} and status not in ('Ended OK') and confirmflag = 'N' and holdflag = 'N' and forceokflag = 'N' and killflag = 'N' order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where status = 'Running' and realstarttime is not null and realstarttime < (NOW() - INTERVAL #{timeoutHours} HOUR) order by realstarttime

select orderid, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, stepseq , sum(1) as total , sum(case when status = 'Ended OK' then 1 else 0 end) as ok , sum(case when status = 'Ended not OK' then 1 else 0 end) as notok , sum(case when status = 'Running' then 1 else 0 end) as running ,sum(case when status = 'Wait condition' then 1 else 0 end) as wait from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable where orderid= #{orderid} group by orderid, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, stepseq order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} and steptype in ('EXE_DELETE', 'EXE_UPDATE')

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} and stepseq= #{stepseq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} and stepseq= (select min(stepseq) from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep where orderid= #{orderid} group by orderid )
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep set status= 'Running', realstarttime= NOW(), realendtime= null, runcnt = runcnt + 1 where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmflag= #{confirmflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, holdflag= #{holdflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, forceokflag= #{forceokflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, killflag= #{killflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, basedate= str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), threadcnt= #{threadcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runcnt= #{runcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stepname= #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stepseq= #{stepseq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, totaltabcnt= #{totaltabcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, successtabcnt= #{successtabcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runningtime= #{runningtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realstarttime= str_to_date(#{realstarttime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s'), realendtime= str_to_date(#{realendtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') orderuserid= #{orderuserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep set status='Wait condition', runningtime=null, successtabcnt=null, realstarttime=null, confirmflag= 'N', holdflag= 'N', forceokflag= 'N'
where orderid= #{orderid} and status not in ('Ended OK', 'Wait condition')
mapper.select:
select orderid, status, confirmflag, holdflag, forceokflag, killflag, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, threadcnt, commitcnt, runcnt, jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, totaltabcnt, successtabcnt, runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, orderuserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep
order by orderid, jobid, version, stepseq limit #{offset}, #{amount}
